mapper.sql: SELECT ROWNUM AS ktPlcyNum ,HST.PLCY_ID AS plcyId ,HST.SLS_NO AS slsNo ,HST.SLS_NM AS slsNm ,HST.PLCY_TYPE AS plcyType ,FN_GET_CODENM('ORG0073', HST.PLCY_TYPE) AS plcyTypeNm ,HST.PPPO AS pppo ,FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0013', HST.PPPO) AS pppoNm ,HST.USE_YN AS useYn ,FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0011', HST.USE_YN) AS useYnNm ,DIST.DC_TYPE AS dcType ,DIST.DC_TYPE_NM AS dcTypeNm ,OPER.OPER_TYPE AS operType ,OPER.OPER_TYPE_NM AS operTypeNm ,INST.INST_CNT AS instCnt ,INST.INST_CNT_NM AS instCntNm ,ENGG.ENGG_CNT AS enggCnt ,ENGG.ENGG_CNT_NM AS enggCntNm ,FN_GET_USRNM(HST.REGST_ID) AS regstId ,HST.REGST_DTTM AS regstDttm FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_HST HST, (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.DC_TYPE, '/'), '/') AS DC_TYPE, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.CD_DSC, '/'), '/') AS DC_TYPE_NM FROM (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, A.DC_TYPE, B.CD_DSC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS NUM, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS CNT FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_DISCOUNT A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.DC_TYPE = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0074' AND A.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM=1 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLCY_ID = A.PLCY_ID AND PRIOR NUM = NUM-1) DIST, (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.OPER_TYPE, '/'), '/') AS OPER_TYPE, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.CD_DSC, '/'), '/') AS OPER_TYPE_NM FROM (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, A.OPER_TYPE, B.CD_DSC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS NUM, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS CNT FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_OPER A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.OPER_TYPE = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND A.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM=1 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLCY_ID = A.PLCY_ID AND PRIOR NUM = NUM-1) OPER, (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.INST_CNT, '/'), '/') AS INST_CNT, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.CD_DSC, '/'), '/') AS INST_CNT_NM FROM (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, A.INST_CNT, B.CD_DSC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS NUM, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS CNT FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_INST A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.INST_CNT = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'ORG0017' AND A.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM=1 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLCY_ID = A.PLCY_ID AND PRIOR NUM = NUM-1) INST, (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.ENGG_CNT, '/'), '/') AS ENGG_CNT, LTRIM(SYS_CONNECT_BY_PATH(A.CD_DSC, '/'), '/') AS ENGG_CNT_NM FROM (SELECT A.PLCY_ID, A.SLS_NO, A.ENGG_CNT, B.CD_DSC, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS NUM, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY A.PLCY_ID ORDER BY A.PLCY_ID) AS CNT FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_ENGG A, CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.ENGG_CNT = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0053' AND A.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) A WHERE LEVEL = CNT START WITH NUM=1 CONNECT BY PRIOR A.PLCY_ID = A.PLCY_ID AND PRIOR NUM = NUM-1) ENGG WHERE HST.PLCY_ID = DIST.PLCY_ID AND HST.SLS_NO = DIST.SLS_NO AND HST.PLCY_ID = OPER.PLCY_ID AND HST.SLS_NO = OPER.SLS_NO AND HST.PLCY_ID = INST.PLCY_ID AND HST.SLS_NO = INST.SLS_NO AND HST.PLCY_ID = ENGG.PLCY_ID AND HST.SLS_NO = ENGG.SLS_NO AND HST.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY HST.PLCY_ID DESC
mapper.select: /* KtPlcyMgmtMapper.getMspKtPlcyDiscountByGrid */ SELECT DECODE(A.DC_TYPE, NULL, '0', '1') AS chk ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,CD_DSC AS cdNm FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_DISCOUNT A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.DC_TYPE(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0074' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.SLS_NO(+) = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PLCY_ID(+) = #{plcyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ETC1

/* KtPlcyMgmtMapper.getMspKtPlcyOperByGrid */ SELECT DECODE(A.OPER_TYPE, NULL, '0', '1') AS chk ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,CD_DSC AS cdNm FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_OPER A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.OPER_TYPE(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.SLS_NO(+) = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PLCY_ID(+) = #{plcyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ETC1

/* KtPlcyMgmtMapper.getMspKtPlcyInstGrid */ SELECT DECODE(A.INST_CNT, NULL, '0', '1') AS chk ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,CD_DSC AS cdNm FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_INST A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.INST_CNT(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'ORG0017' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.SLS_NO(+) = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PLCY_ID(+) = #{plcyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ETC1

/* KtPlcyMgmtMapper.getMspKtPlcyEnggByGrid */ SELECT DECODE(A.ENGG_CNT, NULL, '0', '1') AS chk ,CD_VAL AS cdVal ,CD_DSC AS cdNm FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_ENGG A ,CMN_GRP_CD_MST B WHERE A.ENGG_CNT(+) = B.CD_VAL AND B.GRP_ID = 'CMN0053' AND B.USG_YN = 'Y' AND A.SLS_NO(+) = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.PLCY_ID(+) = #{plcyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY ETC1
SELECT COUNT(SLS_NO) FROM MSP_KT_PLCY_MST A WHERE A.SLS_NO = #{slsNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
